reasoning: DeepSeek recently released highly competitive models (V3/R1) in early 2025, but maintaining the #1 spot on LMSYS Chatbot Arena exactly on December 31, 2025, will be extremely difficult. The top spot is fiercely contested by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Meta, all of which have massive compute advantages and are expected to release next-generation flagship models (e.g., GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini 2.0 Pro/Ultra, Llama 4) throughout 2025. Historically, OpenAI and Anthropic have dominated the top of the leaderboard, quickly reclaiming it whenever a competitor briefly overtakes them. While DeepSeek has shown incredible efficiency, the likelihood of them releasing a model late enough in 2025 that outperforms all massive US-based frontier models on the specific date of December 31 is relatively low. I estimate the base rate for any single non-OpenAI competitor ending the year at #1 to be around 10-20%.
